simple.name: SIMPLE
simple.description: Timer visible. Sound optional. Training wheels attached.

raw.name: RAW
raw.description: No timer. No sound. Just you and the silence.

spicy.name: SPICY
spicy.description: You set the range. The app decides when you're done.

challenge.title: OPTIONAL CHALLENGE
challenge.description: stay completely still in silence for {{minutes}} minutes

settings.title: SETTINGS
settings.hintsDesc: Welcome screen and session tips are hidden.

hints.welcome1: Put your phone face down and sit in stillness. The app watches — every time you pick it up or switch away, you'll be called back.
hints.welcome2: Complete sessions to build your daily streak and earn coins. Harder modes, longer sessions, and tougher punishments reward more.
hints.welcome3: Choose a duration and punishment in session setup. The orb breathes with you during the session — watch it, and be still.
hints.tips1: Count slowly from 1 to 10 in your head, then back to 1. Let the count be your anchor.
hints.tips2: Breathe naturally. Notice each inhale and exhale without trying to control them.
hints.tips3: When thoughts arise, don't fight them — notice them, then gently return to your count or your breath.
hints.tips4: There is nothing to do right now. Just be here.

grace: I bet you can't do this.
Let's see how long this lasts.
You'll give up. You always do.
I've seen better commitment from houseplants.
This will go poorly for you.
pickup: The phone calls to you and you answer like a dog.
I expected nothing and you still disappointed me.
Five seconds. That is all it took.
You were doing so well. Now you are not.
appSwitch: The audacity. The sheer, breathtaking audacity.
I saw that. I see everything.
That was not an accident. You know what you did.
You chose Instagram over enlightenment. Reflect on that.
Running away won't make your problems smaller. It will make your session longer.
Where did you go? DID IT HELP? NO. COME BACK.
I cannot believe you. And yet, here we are.
complete: You have done the bare minimum. Good.
Even a broken clock is right twice a day.
streakBroken: The streak is dead. Begin again.
streakMilestone: Consistency noted. Do not make it a personality.
The streak grows. So do my expectations.
challenge: Bet you can't do this one.
This will end poorly for you. Do it anyway.
You're going to say no. Prove me wrong.

grace: You showed up. That already means something.
Breathe. You know how to do this.
Leave the world outside for a while.
pickup: The mind wanders. That's normal. Return.
Phones are designed to distract. You're fighting that. Come back.
One interruption doesn't ruin the session.
appSwitch: Hey — you stepped away intentionally. That's okay. Come back.
You left. The door is still open. Return.
The pull is strong. You felt it. Now return.
That was a deliberate choice. This is a better one.
Noticed. It's okay. What matters is you're back.
The world waited. It'll keep waiting. You're here now.
You went somewhere else. That somewhere isn't going anywhere. Come back.
complete: Every session counts. This one counted.
You did the hard thing. That's everything.
Look at you. Still here, still trying.
The fact you finished means something.
That was real practice. Be proud.
streakBroken: Rest is part of the practice. Begin again.
Streaks end. New ones begin. Today.
It's okay. You know the way back.
streakMilestone: Consistency is the whole game. You're playing it.
This streak is real. You built it.
Day by day. That's how it works.
challenge: One more round? You've got it in you.
Think you can go deeper? Try.
This one's shorter. You can do it.
The stillness is still there. Go find it again.
You already know how. Do it once more.
